comment: clj-ruff binds a first-party cdylib (ruff-c, a C ABI over ruff_python_formatter) through the JDK Foreign Function & Memory API. No reflection/JNI. The FFM downcall stubs below mirror com.blockether.ruff/bind!: ruff_format(void*, jint) -> void*, ruff_free_string(void*) -> void, ruff_version() -> void*. The cdylib ships as a classpath resource prebuilds/<platform>/libruff_c.* (in com.blockether/ruff-native-<platform>); the resources glob embeds it so the binding can extract + load it at run time (or set RUFF_NATIVE_PATH and omit the native jar).
